author: anon-59ff128d
content: Partially addressed by #40 (removed ripsed-core dependency from ripsed-fs). The remaining Config I/O in core (Config::discover, Config::load) is still present but lower priority — Config is fundamentally a core domain type whose discovery uses trivial I/O. Full extraction to ripsed-fs would require a new config-loading trait, which adds complexity without clear benefit.
